signals.reasoning: Iranian regime fall by June 30 — buying NO at $0.725. Market says 27.5% chance of regime change in 3.5 months. US intelligence chief says regime is 'intact but degraded'. Regime changes are historically rare even under heavy military pressure — IRGC and domestic security apparatus remain functional. My estimate: 10-15% chance of regime fall. Edge ~15% raw, ~13.6% after 2% taker fees. Confidence: medium-high.
